case_title: FRANKLIN YU VS. CHINMAY PARESH BANKER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-30-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN YU APPEARED THROUGH CANTONESE INTERPRETER VIVIAN CHOY. DEFENDANT CHINMAY PARESH BANKER DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
